movie.synopsis: Howl’s Moving Castle (2004) Howls Moving Castle (2004) When Sophie, a shy young woman, is cursed with an old body by a spiteful witch, her only chance of breaking the spell lies with a self-indulgent yet insecure young wizard and his companions in his legged, walking castle.
